Jordan Walker’s Homer Not Enough to Help Cardinals Beat Brewers Thursday
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals played the final game of their 5 games in 4 days marathon against Milwaukee Thursday night and many of us are happy to see the Brewers leave town. Jordan Walker would homer, but that wouldn’t be enough for the Cardinals to avoid losing 4 of 5 from the Brew Crew. There […]
